subject: Radio sponsor invoice not received - Covenant Insurance Group
description: The February sponsor invoice for Covenant Insurance Group was due on March 1 but has not arrived. I need to send the correct amount to TJ for the station reconciliation. Please resend to rebecca.price@memorialhospital-mem.org.

subject: Missed delivery - holiday floral arrangement
description: Placed an order with Mitchell's Flowers on December 21 for a Sunday delivery to South Memphis. The arrangement did not arrive by the Christmas brunch. Order confirmation number attached. Please refund or redeliver.

subject: Request for show recap transcript - December 6 episode
description: A listener who is hearing-impaired requested a written transcript of the December 6 Morning Reflections segment on grief and resilience. Can you send a plain-text transcript or confirm whether accessible archives are available on the WGSP website?

subject: AT&T - unexpected charge on December phone bill
description: My December AT&T bill shows a $28 international roaming charge I did not incur. My phone plan is standard domestic. Please investigate and credit the account. Account holder: Rebecca Price, rebecca.price@memorialhospital-mem.org.

subject: CPE continuing-education certificate - missing from APC portal
description: Completed 8 CPE hours at the Regional One Health workshop on December 5. The certificate has not appeared in the Association of Professional Chaplains online portal. Current total should be 28 hours toward the 2026 deadline of 50. Please confirm credit posting.

subject: Guest booking form not submitting on show website
description: Tried to submit a guest pitch form on the WGSP Morning Reflections page for a potential February interview. The Submit button does nothing after filling all required fields. Using Safari on iPhone 15 Pro. TJ Jackson is aware but asked me to file a ticket.

subject: Book order - Henri Nouwen titles out of stock
description: Placed an order at Midtown Pages on December 20 for two Henri Nouwen titles: The Wounded Healer and Reaching Out. Both show in-stock online but the confirmation email says backordered 4-6 weeks. Requesting update or alternative sourcing.

subject: Bluff City Auto Care - oil change appointment confirmation
description: Scheduled a 30,000-mile service for my 2021 Toyota Camry on January 10 at 8 AM. Have not received a confirmation text or email. Please confirm the appointment is on the books at the Midtown location.

subject: Community health fair vendor coordination - Grace Community Church
description: Following up on the community church health fair with Deacon Charles Mosley. Need confirmation that the three vendor tables reserved for the blood pressure screening, dental hygiene display, and nutrition resources are still confirmed for the October date. Contact me at rebecca.price@memorialhospital-mem.org.

subject: Covenant Insurance - supplemental life policy document request
description: Requesting a copy of my current $75,000 supplemental life insurance policy documents for my personal records. Policy holder: Rebecca Price, rebecca.price@memorialhospital-mem.org. Please send to the email on file.

subject: Marcus tuition confirmation for Fall 2026 - Crescent City University
description: Need written confirmation that the Fall 2026 semester tuition payment was received and applied to Marcus Price (student, junior, communications). The co-payer submits his half directly to the university; please confirm both portions are credited before the fall enrollment deadline.

subject: Morning Reflections listener feedback - January 10 episode on forgiveness
description: A listener wrote in saying the January 10 segment on forgiveness and reconciliation was the most meaningful radio content they had heard in years. They asked if a printed reflection guide could be made available. Forwarding to Rebecca Price for acknowledgment and possible follow-up resource.

subject: Xfinity - internet outage affecting Wednesday radio prep session
description: Experienced a full internet outage at my home in Cooper-Young from approximately 5:45 PM-8:30 PM on Wednesday January 7, disrupting my weekly radio prep session. Requesting confirmation of the outage and a credit applied to my account.

subject: Amazon - return request for damaged Canva subscription gift card
description: Ordered two Canva Pro gift cards as appreciation gifts for CPE residents. One arrived with a scratched redemption code. Requesting a replacement or refund for the damaged item. Order date: January 5. Order confirmation in email.

subject: CPE resident orientation materials - request for updated binder
description: The two current CPE residents at Bluff City Medical Center need updated orientation binders for the winter cohort rotation. Requesting the revised pastoral care policy documents from Dr. Lorraine Vickers' office be sent to me digitally before February 28.

subject: Naomi - Memphis Youth Services event coordination question
description: Naomi Price from Memphis Youth Services is asking whether the Grace Community Church fellowship hall is available on February 21 for a youth resource fair she is co-organizing. She needs a yes or no by February 6 to finalize vendor invitations.

subject: Brenda - financial POA document annual review
description: Brenda Price-Hall is requesting a copy of the current financial power-of-attorney document for the annual review she conducts each January. Please confirm which version is on file and send the PDF to brenda.pricehall@gmail.com.

subject: Mitchell's Flowers - sponsor delivery confirmation for January 17 broadcast
description: Mitchell's Flowers is a WGSP Morning Reflections sponsor. Need confirmation that the on-air mention acknowledgment was processed and that the January 17 episode credit is logged in the billing system. Please send confirmation to rebecca.price@memorialhospital-mem.org.

subject: Sandra - Cafe Eclectic brunch reservation for January 24
description: Sandra Coles is coordinating our standing Saturday brunch. She filed a request to confirm whether the Cafe Eclectic reservation for January 24 at 10 AM is locked in for two people. Please confirm or note if rebooking is needed.

subject: Bluff City Auto Care - radio sponsor invoice for Q1 2026
description: Bluff City Auto Care is a Q1 radio sponsor for Morning Reflections on WGSP 1490 AM. The quarterly sponsor invoice for January-March 2026 has not been acknowledged. Please confirm receipt and forward to TJ Jackson at WGSP for reconciliation.
